curation_notes: The patch modifies only openssl/src/bio.rs, adding a null/empty check before calling slice::from_raw_parts in MemBio::get_buf. The pre-assigned class null-deref (CWE-476) is correct — the vulnerability is a null pointer passed to slice::from_raw_parts when BIO_get_mem_data returns a null pointer for an empty buffer. No sibling files share this pattern; MemBio is the only BIO abstraction in the crate.
